google.text: 4G LOGISTICS GROUP 4G LOGISTICS LLC 16508 Lacross Ln Chesterfield, MO 63005 Docket: MC1139220 Phone: 314-627-2527 LOAD CONFIRMATION Load # Date Equipment Equipment Length Temperature 17461 03/30/2025 Reefer 53' 25°F Weight Commodity 40000 lbs Fresh Chicken 804 Power Unit Trailer Distance Declared Value 129240 999 miles 99999.00 Carrier Information DAVUTRANS INC 851 SUMMIT CREEK DRIVE SHOREWOOD, IL 60404 (217)-576-8846 Notes and References Notes MC Number MC01440653 Anna G Primary Contact Phone Fax (217)-576-8846 Driver Aaram Phone 929-509-1413 Email undefined Fax MUST HAVE FOOD GRADE TRAILER WITH WORKING REEFER & AIR CHUTE // NO TONU IF REJECTED // NO DETENTION IF LATE // CARRIER SUBJECT TO LATE FEES UPON LATE PICK-UP/DELIVERY // MUST MAINTAIN 25 DEGREES F CONTINUOUS THROUGHOUT TRANSIT // LOAD MUST ARRIVE SEAL IN TACT Reference(s) 41218 Stops/Actions # Action Date/Time Location Contact 1 Pickup 03/28/25 17:00 Pilgrims Pride Douglas, GA 113 McNeil Dr Primary Contact Phone: Douglas, GA 31533-2715 USA References: 8000540486 2 Delivery 03/31/25 06:00 Stella & Chewy's 111 W Oakview Pkwy Oak Creek, WI 53154 USA References: 41218 Pay Items Description Flat Rate Total Notes Primary Contact Phone: +1 888-477-8977 Quantity Rate Amount 1 150.00 150.00 150.00 These rates are an amendment to our contract that is currently on file between your company and 4G Logistics. If no contract exists, this confirmation will act as contract between your company and 4G Logistics with all provisions from original contract still effective. 4G Logistics is a transportation intermediary and not a motor carrier. All shipments conducted between our two companies reflect this understanding. All freight moved for 4G Logistics must be considered time sensitive. Unless stated otherwise all loads are for exclusive use of trailer. Loads must be delivered on set delivery dates and set delivery times. Loads that do not meet the set date, time, or exclusivity criteria, will be subject to anyand all applicable fines, unless arrangements have been previously made in a timely manner with an 4G Logistics representative. Excessive late fees may apply. Carrier agrees to follow all FMCSA regulations required for the load described above. The above carrier certifies that he will take possession of freight. If another carrier shows up, they will not be loaded. Re-brokering, assigning or interlining of this shipment without prior written consent will CONSTITUTE FORFEITURE OF PAYMENT. All invoices must include a signed rate confirmation and a signed delivery receipt within 24 hours of delivery. Please send all BOL and Invoices to accounting@4glogisticsgroup.com Page 1 out of 2 Load #17461 Powered by AscendTMS.com | Tommy Gallant (4G LOGISTICS LLC)
